goal: add Avaritia Creative Wand as a proper addon extension with infinite vis, without fake placeholder behavior
implemented: AvaritiaCreativeWandItem extends WandItem and explicitly overrides infinite-vis behavior.
WandItem core now supports hasInfiniteVis/getVis/consumeVis/addVis safely.
Creative rod/cap types added: WandRodType.CREATIVE and WandCapType.INFINITY.
Creative wand uses the same custom WandItemRenderer architecture from Stage98.
Creative wand item model uses minecraft:builtin/entity, not item/generated/2D.
Creative wand renderer textures added under textures/entity/wand/rod_creative_infinity.png and cap_infinity.png.
Creative wand icon added for inventory/creative tab/search only.
Language entries added for en_us and ru_ru.
no_costyl_notes: This item is not claimed to be an original TC4 item.
It is an addon-extension requested for Avaritia/infinity-style gameplay.
It uses the same rod/cap data and custom renderer pipeline instead of a separate fake 2D item.
behavior: Does not drain aura nodes when charged.
remaining: Need exact Avaritia asset import if a real Avaritia source jar is provided.
Need optional integration with a separate Avaritia mod id if this project is split into multiple mods.
Need focus renderer and wand particle effects from Stage100+.
